topic: A new card appears in my wallet each week, all in my name, from towns I have never visited.
title: A New Card In My Wallet Every Week | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every Monday a new card sits in my wallet, in my name.
scenes.image_prompt: A worn leather wallet open on a kitchen counter, plastic cards fanned out, dim morning light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone in a small apartment near the river.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet one bedroom apartment interior, closed blinds, low light, dust in the air, muted colors, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I check that wallet every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand placing a wallet on a nightstand beside a lamp, warm dim glow, heavy shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first card named a town three hundred miles away.
scenes.image_prompt: A single membership card lying on a dark table, faint printed lettering, harsh side light, grainy texture, vertical 9:16 framing
A road map unfolded on a floor, one distant town circled in pencil, low lamplight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each new card listed a place farther than the last, all signed by me.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of plastic cards laid out in a line on wood, faint signatures visible, cold light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove to the nearest town to ask.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty small town main street at dusk through a windshield, fog, dim streetlamps, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The clerk smiled and said I came in often.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim convenience store counter from the customer side, register glowing, empty aisles behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He described a coat and a limp I do not have.
scenes.image_prompt: A long dark coat hanging by a shop door, empty sleeves, harsh fluorescent flicker, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This week the card showed my home town, dated tomorrow.
scenes.image_prompt: A single card held in trembling hands over a table, future date faintly printed, cold light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped sleeping. I started watching the door.
scenes.image_prompt: A front door viewed from a dark hallway, chain lock visible, thin light under the gap, heavy shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night a card arrived for a town that does not exist yet.
scenes.image_prompt: A blank map region on a wall, a pin pushed into empty paper, dim lamplight, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing
